rationale: The citing paper references Berger and Milkman (2012) only once in a grouped literature sentence to illustrate that prior work has used text to predict outcomes such as news virality. The citation functions as a broad background example in the general discussion rather than as a source for this paper's theory, hypotheses, variables, or modeling approach. There is no distinct methodological borrowing or conceptual development tied specifically to this cited paper elsewhere in the article.
